description: Cloud Firestore is Google's managed NoSQL document database for Firebase and Google Cloud applications. It stores and synchronizes structured document data and supports querying, transactions, and realtime application backends.
summary: Firestore exposes a public MCP server endpoint at `https://firestore.googleapis.com/mcp` plus the Cloud Firestore REST API at `https://firestore.googleapis.com/v1`, which accepts either Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens or Firebase Authentication ID tokens.
